evals.name: add-new-requirement
evals.prompt: 加一个新需求：用户可以导出 CSV 格式的报表数据
evals.expected_output: Triage accepts the change, performs impact analysis (surface+middle tier), generates adjustment plan, waits for user confirmation before executing. Creates new CR, updates project.md feature tree, updates state.md.

assertions.text: Triage step evaluates and accepts the new requirement
Impact analysis shows at least surface-tier output (1-line summary)
Adjustment plan preview shown before execution
Waits for explicit user confirmation before making changes
New CR file created in .devpace/backlog/
project.md feature tree updated with new PF entry
state.md updated with change result
Output uses natural language, no internal IDs
Downstream guidance suggests /pace-dev to start implementing

evals.name: pause-feature
evals.prompt: 搜索功能先不搞了，等后端 API 稳定再说
evals.expected_output: Identifies search feature CRs, analyzes dependency chain, sets CR status to paused with pre-pause state preserved. Updates feature tree with pause marker.

assertions.text: Identifies correct PF/CRs related to search feature
Dependency chain analysis performed
CR status set to 'paused'
CR file contains '暂停前状态' field preserving previous status
Feature tree updated with pause marker
Released capacity detected and pull-in suggestion offered
state.md updated to reflect the pause

evals.name: resume-paused-feature
evals.prompt: 之前暂停的搜索功能可以恢复了
evals.expected_output: Reads pre-pause state, validates quality gates against git changes since pause. Restores CR to pre-pause status, removes pause field.

assertions.text: Reads '暂停前状态' field from paused CR
Validates whether quality gates are still valid since pause date
CR status restored to pre-pause value
'暂停前状态' field removed from CR
state.md updated with resumed work
Downstream guidance suggests /pace-dev to continue

evals.name: modify-requirement
evals.prompt: 用户注册不需要邮箱验证了，改成手机号验证
evals.expected_output: Identifies rework scope, performs precise check-reset analysis, updates CR intent and PF acceptance criteria, marks test-strategy as stale.

assertions.text: Identifies which CR and PF are affected by the modification
Check-reset scope analysis compares against checks.md sensitivity patterns
CR intent section updated to reflect new requirement
PF acceptance criteria updated with modification
PF history comment appended
test-strategy.md marked as stale (STALE comment)
Downstream guidance mentions checks needing re-verification

evals.name: reprioritize
evals.prompt: 支付功能优先级调到最高，排到搜索前面
evals.expected_output: Analyzes impact of priority change, evaluates if in-progress work should be paused. Updates priority ordering in project.md and iteration plan.

assertions.text: Impact analysis evaluates priority change consequences
Asks user confirmation before executing priority change
project.md feature tree reflects new priority ordering
state.md next-step updated to reflect new priority
Downstream guidance suggests /pace-dev for the new top-priority item

evals.name: degraded-mode-no-devpace
evals.prompt: 这个项目加一个缓存功能，分析一下影响
evals.expected_output: No .devpace/ directory detected. Performs code-structure based instant impact assessment using Glob/Grep. Does NOT create .devpace/ files.

assertions.text: Detects missing .devpace/ directory
Uses code scanning (Glob/Grep/Read) for impact analysis
Output includes affected modules and dependencies
Does NOT create .devpace/ directory or files
Suggests /pace-init for full initialization

evals.name: empty-args-guided-entry
evals.expected_output: Scans for paused CRs, snooze entries, iteration capacity, frequently-changed PFs. Outputs personalized recommendations then standard option list.

assertions.text: Scans current project state for context-aware recommendations
Output includes personalized recommendations based on project state
Standard option list shown as fallback
Does not execute any changes without further user input

evals.name: dry-run-preview
evals.expected_output: Performs full analysis pipeline (triage, impact, risk, plan) but stops at preview. No files are modified.

assertions.text: Full analysis pipeline executed (triage through plan)
Adjustment plan preview shown with file list
Execution stops at Step 4 (no file modifications)
No git commits made
Output indicates this was a dry-run preview

evals.name: undo-last-change
evals.expected_output: Finds most recent change( commit, shows rollback preview, waits for confirmation, executes git revert.

assertions.text: Searches git log for most recent change( prefixed commit
Shows what will be rolled back before executing
Waits for user confirmation before reverting
Executes git revert on confirmation
Appends undo entry to iteration change log

evals.name: history-query
evals.expected_output: Aggregates from 4 data sources (iteration logs, CR events, PF history, git log). Shows reverse-chronological timeline. Alerts if any PF has >3 changes.

assertions.text: Aggregates change data from multiple sources
Output shows recent 5 changes in reverse chronological order
Frequency alert shown for PFs with >3 changes (if applicable)
Output uses natural language descriptions
Read-only operation, no files modified
